creator: aiza21@comclark.com
text:
The base still contains examples for pppd (kernel-ppp) 
PPPD has been removed from the base release. 
Delete this directory from the base system 
/usr/share/examples/pppd

Same thing for slip which has also been removed.
Delete these directories from the base system 
/usr/share/examples/sliplogin
/usr/share/examples/startslip
